text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's almost time for Oguri Cap to start her senior
year. We pay a visit to a shrine to ring in the New
Year and pray for her success on the track.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I was just thinking about the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I know it was some time ago now, but... I just can't
forget it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The cheers from the crowd, the energy all
around... That day is on my mind twenty-four
seven.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I definitely understand where she's coming from.
No other race gets the fans as hyped up as the
Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...It's thanks to my fans that I can keep running.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'd love for them to pick me for the Arima Kinen. I want to win—and to keep winning.
choice_data_list: Super Creek will be there too.
Super Creek will be there too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...That's right. I've gotta get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Hopefully our prayers are answered...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What else should I wish for on my prayer tablet?
choice_data_list:
Wish for good health and to avoid getting
injured.

Wish to become a beast with unparalleled
strength.

Wish to learn new skills and expand your
abilities.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course. There are still plenty of tough
races ahead, after all.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
So essentially, I have to look after my health. In
that case...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should make eating lots of food my wish
instead.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her there's no point in praying for that since
she already eats plenty.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a beast, huh? You're funny. That isn't a bad
wish though.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If I have unparalleled strength, maybe I won't get
lost so often...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While not completely out of the question, I still
advise her to rely on somebody else's guidance
for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Skills? Like cooking skills?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Oh... I see.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But if I were able to cook... I could enjoy food
even more than I do now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Expanding on her abilities is great and all, but I
wish she'd learn the secret of not overeating too...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, I'm finished writing. Why don't we start
heading home?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama?!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Here for your New Year's shrine visit? Guess ya
got a lot to pray for, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Not me, though. I got a declaration to make—I'm
gonna be the best!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What's with the long face? C'mon, Oguri, put a li'l
more fire in your belly!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I can't. I...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I don't think I can seriously compete against you...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: ...I'm such a dummy.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Here I was thinkin' ya saw me as a rival...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Couldn't've been further from the truth, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No! Tama, I...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
When all's said and done, you also just see me as
an annoyin' li'l squirt.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh...
choice_data_list: ...Aren't you going to chase after her?
...Aren't you going to chase after her?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: No. There's nothing I can really say...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following the year-end Arima Kinen, Tamamo
Cross declared war against Oguri Cap, and Oguri
Cap hasn't been quite herself ever since...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I underestimate her. I've always
known I'd compete against her one day.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But... Tama always treats me like a friend. And
that makes me really happy.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've never had a friend like her before—someone I
could compete with, run side by side with, and
who also understood what I was going through.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's why I ended up taking her for
granted.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
All Tama wanted was to compete with me in
earnest, but I reacted in the worst possible way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap was miles ahead of her competitors
back in her hometown, which makes it very
confusing for her to have someone be both a
friend and rival at once.
choice_data_list: You have to clear up this misunderstanding.
You have to clear up this misunderstanding.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Knowing how close the two of them are, there's
no doubt in my mind that their relationship will
eventually get back on track. Holding on to that
belief, I wrap up our shrine visit.
